caption: Table 10 pinpoints key ideas from Exhibit 14 above. For example, over a one-year period,
extracted_text: Table 10 pinpoints key ideas from Exhibit 14 above. For example, over a one-year period, there is a 5 percent chance that there will be a wind event causing $600,000 of damage, but there is a 90 percent chance of zero damage. However, over a ten-year period, the risk increases. There is a 5 percent chance that there will be a high wind event causing $3.5 million in damage, and a 90 percent chance that there will be at least $600,000 in damage due to high winds.
